steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The word tension is the defining clue — the passage states that Cannon's work derives its power from the tension among his _____ influences. Tension signals conflict or opposition between different forces.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Disparate means fundamentally different or conflicting—which explains the tension.

The influences listed pull in opposite directions: portraiture emphasizes realistic depth, pop art emphasizes vivid color, and flatstyle rejects depth entirely.

Complementary and interchangeable contradict the stated tension, while unknown mischaracterizes clearly named influences.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
